title: AI Agent
description:
Real AI, right inside your workflows. **AI Agent** runs LLMs (Claude, any OpenAI-compatible endpoint, or a local Ollama server) as prompt-in, text-out blocks you can wire into any Brika flow.

- **Ask AI** — send a prompt to an LLM and emit the completion; tune the model, system prompt, effort (low, medium, high), and max tokens to summarize, classify, draft, or rewrite inside a flow
- **Call Tool** — invoke a hub-registered tool by id and emit its result
- **AI Agent** — an LLM that reasons over each prompt and calls your hub-registered tools to answer it

Set one provider key in the plugin preferences (Anthropic, OpenAI, an OpenAI-compatible base URL, or an Ollama server) and every AI block shares it. Keys never leave the hub: they are stored in the OS keychain and sent only to the provider you configure.
